effects.name: Edge Glow
effects.description: Ambilight-style glow that mirrors the source monitor's edge colors onto adjacent displays.

effects.name: Plasma Flow
effects.description: Slow-breathing plasma clouds tinted by the screen palette and stirred by the music.

effects.name: Spectrum Bars
effects.description: A glowing frequency spectrum with reflections, colored by what's on screen.

effects.name: Particle Field
effects.description: Thousands of GPU particles drifting through screen colors and pulsing with the beat.

effects.name: Aurora
effects.description: Northern-lights ribbons that ripple with bass and take their colors from the screen edges.
